_note: normalization_factor: tuned so baseline hero (Aria at starting stats) scores 100. Aria raw = DPR(7.2) * EHP(34.67) = 249.6 => factor = 100/249.6 = 0.4006. Update if baseline hero stats change significantly.
_stat_costs_note: Legacy linear cost table — used by compute_curves() and calibrate_weights.py.
